title: Mahavira Jain temple
tagline: Mahavira Jain temple — spiritual town of Rajasthan

overview.short: The Mahavira Jain temple is built in Osian of Jodhpur District, Rajasthan.
overview.description: The Mahavira Jain temple is built in Osian of Jodhpur District, Rajasthan. The temple is an important pilgrimage of the Oswal Jain community. This temple is the oldest surviving Jain temple in Western India and was built during the reign of Mahārāja Śrī Vatsarāja of Imperial Pratihāras.

topPlaces.name: Osian, Rajasthan
topPlaces.description: Osian (also spelt Osiyan) is an ancient town located in the Jodhpur District of Rajasthan state in western India. It is an oasis in the Thar Desert.

topPlaces.name: Dhundhara
topPlaces.description: Dhundhara is a village located in the Jodhpur district of Rajasthan in northern India. It is 25 km (16 mi) from sub-district headquarters Luni, Rajasthan, and 65 km (40 mi) from district headquarters Jodhpur.

items.note: Osian (also spelt Osiyan) is an ancient town located in the Jodhpur District of Rajasthan state in western India. It is an oasis in the Thar Desert.

Dhundhara is a village located in the Jodhpur district of Rajasthan in northern India. It is 25 km (16 mi) from sub-district headquarters Luni, Rajasthan, and 65 km (40 mi) from district headquarters Jodhpur.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mahavira Jain temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mahavira Jain temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mahavira Jain temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jodhpur Airport (55 km) and the nearest railway station is Jodhpur Junction (49 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mahavira Jain temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mahavira Jain temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mahavira Jain temple?
faq.a: Stays in Mahavira Jain temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mahavira Jain temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Osian, Rajasthan, Dhundhara.
